app.name: Respire
app.tagline: Take your breath back, one minute at a time.

onboarding.welcomeBody: A calm app to track your progress, handle cravings and stay on track.
onboarding.landingBody: Your counter. Your money. Your body recovering.
onboarding.setupBody: Everything is calculated locally from three simple inputs.
onboarding.lastCigaretteTitle: When did you smoke your last cigarette?
onboarding.lastCigaretteBody: Be precise — everything starts from that moment.
onboarding.stepOneTitle: When do you want to start from?
onboarding.stepOneBody: We start from the exact date and time of your last cigarette.
onboarding.todayOptionBody: Start from earlier in the day
onboarding.productTypeBody: Choose your product to adapt calculations and labels throughout the app.
onboarding.cigarettesPerDayBody: Adjust the value to calculate savings and avoided {{unit}}.
onboarding.stepTwoBody: Pick a simple baseline. You can fine-tune it later.
onboarding.packPriceBody: We display potential savings in real time based on {{label}}.
onboarding.stepThreeBody: We use this to calculate your savings in real time.
onboarding.motivationTitle: Why do you want to quit?
onboarding.motivationBody: Multiple answers allowed. This step is optional.
onboarding.stepFourTitle: Why do you want to quit?
onboarding.stepFourBody: Multiple answers are possible. You can also skip this step.
onboarding.notificationsTitle: Stay motivated, even on bad days
onboarding.notificationsBody: Daily reminder and notification for each unlocked badge.
onboarding.notificationsCardBody: Respire works without notifications, but they help when motivation dips.
onboarding.readyBody: Your counter, savings and milestones are ready.

cigarette.title: Cigarette
cigarette.priceBody: the price of your pack of 20 cigarettes

vape_puffs.title: E-cigarette
vape_puffs.priceBody: the price of your vape cartridge

vape_pods.title: Pods / Cartridges
vape_pods.priceBody: the price of a pod or cartridge

rolling.title: Rolling tobacco
rolling.priceBody: the price of your rolling tobacco pouch

cigarillo.title: Cigarillo
cigarillo.priceBody: the price of your box of cigarillos

cigar.title: Cigar
cigar.priceBody: the unit price of your cigar

pipe.title: Pipe
pipe.priceBody: the price of your pipe tobacco

reward.label: Savings jar
reward.title: My reward
reward.body: Set a concrete goal. The app fills the jar with your real-time savings.
reward.achievedBody: You reached {{label}} with {{saved}} saved. The target was {{amount}} EUR.

statsScreen.title: Statistics
statsScreen.subtitle: See what your nicotine-free time is really changing.
statsScreen.healthSubtitle: Each milestone reached makes the next one more real.
statsScreen.behaviorBadgesSubtitle: They reward commitment, not just time.
statsScreen.badgesSubtitle: Unlocked in color, upcoming in grey.

sosScreen.title: SOS Mode
sosScreen.subtitle: An immediate action to let the craving pass.
sosScreen.cravingBody: Breathe deeply. This craving will pass.
sosScreen.guidanceTitle: Cut the impulse before it builds.
sosScreen.guidanceBody: Pick a short action. The goal is not to perform, just to bring the peak back down.
sosScreen.doneTitle: You just let the craving fade.
sosScreen.doneBody: Stay on this path. The most useful thing now is not to restart the loop.

journalScreen.title: Journal
journalScreen.subtitle: Daily tracking of cravings and mood.
journalScreen.lockedBody: Unlock daily tracking, heatmap and trends.

paywall.title: Go Premium
paywall.subtitle: Less than a pack of cigarettes.
paywall.heroTitle: Stay quit longer, with more clarity.
paywall.heroBody: Premium turns Respire into a tracking tool, not just a counter.
paywall.pointJournal: Daily journal to see the days slipping by without fooling yourself.
paywall.pointTrends: Mood and craving trends to feel the real improvements.
paywall.pointReminders: More useful reminders when you sense motivation shifting.
paywall.metricLabelTwo: full tracking with the annual plan
paywall.bestValueBody: The plan that truly follows you over time.
paywall.yearlyBody: Cheaper per year, with the best lever to stay quit.
paywall.yearlyPerMonth: 2.92 EUR / month — cheaper than a pack
paywall.monthlyPitch: The right entry point to try premium tracking.
paywall.compareBody: Free helps you start. Premium helps you last.

settingsScreen.title: Settings
settingsScreen.subtitle: Set your frame. Everything that helps you stay quit lives here.
settingsScreen.profileBody: Fix your quit date, consumption and reference price.
settingsScreen.profileWarning: Editing this data will recalculate all your statistics.
settingsScreen.profileConfirm: Saving will update counter, savings and milestones.
settingsScreen.notificationsBody: Fine control of reminders, permissions and messages.
settingsScreen.appearanceBody: Choose dark, light or automatic. Change takes effect immediately.
settingsScreen.languageBody: EN active. Other languages coming soon.
settingsScreen.subscriptionBody: Manage your plan and restore purchases without leaving the app.
settingsScreen.premiumActive: Full access to journal, trends and advanced tracking.
settingsScreen.freeActive: Free version active. Premium unlocks full tracking.
settingsScreen.aboutBody: Version, legal notices, privacy and support.
settingsScreen.resetDevBody: This will erase onboarding, profile, journal and premium state on this device.
settingsScreen.permissionDenied: Notifications denied. You can change this in system settings.

zen.title: Zen Zone
zen.subtitle: Preventive sessions to calm stress before it builds.
zen.homeBody: Three guided techniques to unwind, sleep or break a craving before it becomes an emergency.
zen.focusBody: Pick a rhythm and stick with it until the end of the cycle.
zen.doneBody: Session complete. Your rhythm is coming down — keep this calm for a few more minutes.

techniques.coherenceBody: 5s inhale, 5s exhale to bring stress back down.
techniques.fourSevenEightBody: 4s inhale, 7s hold, 8s exhale to break the peak.
techniques.wimhofBody: 15s rapid deep breaths, then 30s retention, 3 rounds. Boosts energy, cuts the craving.

milestone.title: Milestone reached
milestone.subtitle: You just locked in a visible milestone. This is the kind of moment worth making memorable.
milestone.shareTitle: You can turn this into a strong signal.
milestone.shareBody: Screenshot it, post the badge, and let the streak go public.

notifications.dailyBody: A calm reminder to stay on track.

relapse.title: It happens. You're not alone.
relapse.body: Most people succeed after several attempts. The important thing is to restart cleanly.
relapse.confirmBody: This will recalculate your counter and statistics.
